records.rationale: NonPlayable NPC/display cuirass with vanilla part keywords + vanilla-scale AR44 and NO Requiem material-set keyword. NonPlayable-with-biped-slots is NOT the template skip (that requires no slots); Reqtificator balances NPC-worn armor by its set/type keywords, so derive the full steel-tier frame. Requiem ships no distinct Blades ARMO set — the reused BladesCuirass mesh sits at AR300 (steel body) across the CC alt-armor patches, confirming Steel tier.

records.rationale: Genuine Daedric artifact (the signature Gray Cowl of Nocturnal). Judgment ladder step 1: known artifact → mirror artifact treatment. Already correctly framed (ArmorLight + REQ_ArmorSet_Hide + ArmorHelmet + DaedricArtifact); only the vanilla-scale AR needed lifting to the hide light-head comparable. Value/weight deliberately left off-ladder as an artifact.
records.magic_lane_handoff: ObjectEffect 020119:Gray Fox Cowl.esm (manny_GF_Ench_GrayCowl) — effect design owned by magic lane.

records.flag_question: Jagged Crown copy: the record's own set keyword is REQ_ArmorSet_Daedric with an artifact-tier Value 5000, but the Jagged Crown is lore-wise a unique dragonbone crown, and this copy is NonPlayable (an NPC/display piece with no craft recipe or leveled-list entry). Treat as a daedric-tier heavy helmet (AR 240 per its own keyword), OR mirror the real Jagged Crown's Requiem artifact/dragon-tier treatment? Recommend keeping the daedric-tier derivation since the record already carries the daedric set keyword that drives Reqtificator resist/tempering.

field_checklist.set_material_kw: REQ_ArmorSet_Daedric 06BBD4 (present — kept per record intent; SEE FLAG)
field_checklist.AR_on_ladder: 240 (daedric heavy head; mod had vanilla-scale AR23)
field_checklist.value_weight: Value 5000 authorial/unique (daedric head comparable is 10000); weight not forced

records.rationale: NonPlayable display/NPC crown. Keywords already form a valid daedric heavy-head set, so the concrete derivation is the daedric head comparable (AR 240). Flagged because the material choice (daedric on a Jagged Crown) and artifact-vs-material intent are an authorial call the data can't settle.

records.flag_question: Boots of Springheel Jak (famous jump-boots artifact): tagged LightArmor with REQ_ArmorSet_Leather + ArmorBoots but ArmorRating is 0. Because it carries the leather-set + boots part keywords, the Reqtificator will assign it leather-boots resistance/tempering and expects a real AR. Derive the on-ladder leather light-boots AR (45), OR keep AR 0 as an intentional artifact choice (the boots are about jumping, not protection)? Recommend AR 45 for consistency with the keywords it carries.

field_checklist.AR_on_ladder: 45 derived (leather light feet); mod value 0 — SEE FLAG

records.rationale: Artifact boots. Frame keywords are already leather light-feet; the only open question is whether AR 0 is intentional. Provided the on-ladder AR 45 as the recommended value.
records.magic_lane_handoff: ObjectEffect 019612:Gray Fox Cowl.esm (manny_GF_Ench_BootsofSpringheelJak, 'Run... Fast!') — movement effect owned by magic lane.

records.flag_question: Draukiir Mask: LightArmor head with AR 1 and NO Requiem material-set keyword. 'Draukiir' is a novel/themed (draugr) material with no Requiem set. Borrow the closest light-head tier — REQ_ArmorSet_Hide (crude/ancient, AR60) chosen; REQ_ArmorSet_Leather (also AR60) is an equal alternative. Confirm the intended tier.

notes: Freshness probe OK: instance E:\Skyrim Modding\ARR 2.0, profile 'Authoria - Requiem Reforged - NSFW Profile'; Requiem.esp + Requiem for the Indifferent.esp both in the override chain — the live winner (RftI) is the authority for Requiem's own comparables.

BLINDING honored: every Gray Fox Cowl.esm target read with plugin='Gray Fox Cowl.esm' (its own version), never the winner — for the 11 armored/recipe records whose live winner is 'Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp' this required explicit plugin= reads. The existing Authoria patch was never read. Requiem comparables read as live winners per doctrine.

Blades set material: Requiem defines NO distinct 'Blades' ARMO set (0 matches). Classified as Steel tier (Akaviri steel) — corroborated by the reused BladesCuirass mesh sitting at AR300 (= REQ steel body) across the CC Alternative-Armors Reqtificated patches. Full set derived from REQ_Heavy_Steel_* comparables read live.

Blades cuirass/gauntlets/boots/helmet + Jagged Crown carry MajorFlags=NonPlayable but HAVE biped slots + armor keywords — NOT the 'template ARMO' skip (which requires no biped slots). They are NPC/display armor the Reqtificator still balances by set/type keywords, so they were derived, not skipped. Preserve the NonPlayable flag on write.
YokudaNonPlayable (042437) is a Value-0 NonPlayable exact duplicate of the playable Yokuda (041911) — dispositioned skipped as a display/mannequin twin; its playable twin carries the balance.

Never hand-stamped resist-tier or tempering keywords — REQ_Armor_Resistance_Ranged_Tier5, REQ_Tempering_* and Survival_Armor* are Reqtificator OUTPUTS on the comparables; only the source-carried armorType + REQ_ArmorSet + part + VendorItemArmor (+PerkFists on heavy gauntlets) keywords were set. Get the set keyword right and resist+tempering follow at build.

3 flagged records need an authorial call: (1) Jagged Crown copy 02DCA1 — daedric-tier vs real-artifact treatment; (2) Boots of Springheel Jak 018B4B — on-ladder leather AR45 vs intentional artifact AR0; (3) Draukiir Mask 674F20 — borrowed light-head material (Hide chosen; Leather equal). Concrete recommended derivations provided for each.

14 clothing/jewelry frames (amulets/rings/circlets/hoods/clothes) were already correct AR-0 Requiem clothing/jewelry frames (proper ArmorJewelry/ArmorClothing + Vendor + Clothing* keywords, value on-tier) — dispositioned patched (frame confirmed, no resist/tempering). Enchanted ones route their ObjectEffect to the magic lane.

Magic-lane boundary handoffs (ObjectEffect design NOT set here): Blades Shield 0AD493, Gray Cowl 020119, Boots Springheel 019612, Draukiir Mask 69D8AA, Sayara 03B874, Telrav 10CF26, AncientRedguardHood 0BE00E, AncientRedguardBoots 0BE024, AncientRedguardClothes 0BE02A, Metilius 0AD460, Irlav 0303BB, EagleEye 0190F9, Basil 0AD460, LeftEyeOfColdharbour 01E534.
Race-lane handoff: all 15 ARMA (race-add / creature-naked ArmorAddons) + the 8 creature-skin ARMO route to the race/npc lane.

Weapons-lane handoff: 8 of the 10 COBJ are weapon grindstone recipes (Scorch, Golden Scimitar, Umbra, Ancient Scimitar, Elven Club, Blade of Yokuda, Dawn of Man, Forgotten Chaos Bow). Only 2 COBJ produce armor (Yokuda + Gray Cowl temper recipes at the armor table) — the mod defines no forge recipe for the Blades set (correct: NonPlayable NPC/display armor).
READ-ONLY lane: no plugins created, no fields written — fields_to_set are write-ready houseCARL tokens for the eventual patch, derivations only.
